HGSS.641.0001:
Could you repeat that? I can’t hear
you at all. A bad connection, I guess.\f
Please move along and call again!
HGSS.641.0002:
Hi...
Oh, hi there. What’s happening?\r
Everything’s good with me.\f
HGSS.641.0003:
We both know there’s much stronger
Gym Leaders than me around, right?\r
You’d better be ready to work hard.
HGSS.641.0004:
I’m really sorry, but I’ve got a lot
going on... I’m pretty busy lately...\f
Well, Wednesday mornings I’ve got some
free time. Want to try calling then?
HGSS.641.0005:
Oh hi, I’m free today!
Let’s battle again, OK?[0200,0000]
HGSS.641.0006:
OK! So, I’ll see you at the
Fighting Dojo in Saffron City, then!
HGSS.641.0008:
I’m not sure... Are you making plans
just with me?\f
Didn’t you make some plans with
someone else already?
HGSS.641.0009:
I’m waiting at the Fighting Dojo in
Saffron City.\r
If you stand me up, I’m going to be sad.
HGSS.641.0010:
Yes, this is Misty...
Hi, how are you?\f
HGSS.641.0011:
We made plans to meet at the
Fighting Dojo in Saffron City.\f
You remembered you’re meeting me?
I’ve been so looking forward to this...
HGSS.641.0012:
Hey, have you traveled through all of
the Kanto region yet? How is it,\r
compared to Johto? There’s a lot\r
of beautiful scenery here, right?\f
I especially love the Cape along
Route 25!\f
I’ve got so many memories of things
along that coast...\f
What kinds of memories? Pfft!
Like I’d tell you!
HGSS.641.0013:
That reminds me...
That strange person who came to visit\r
my Gym recently...\f
That was you who defeated him and
sent him off, wasn’t it?\f
I forgot to thank you for that!\f
Everyone in my Gym is really
appreciative. Thanks so much!
HGSS.641.0014:
Hey, did you hear?
If you beat all six people on Route 25,\r
not losing even once, you get to make\r
a true-love wish!\f
You didn’t hear about that?
Really?\f
Well, that would be because I just made
it up! Ha ha ha!
